word: Go down like a lead balloon
definition: To be extremely unsuccessful, unloved, or unpopular.

sentence.en: His political joke went down like a lead balloon.
sentence.uz: Uning siyosiy hazili mutlaqo muvaffaqiyatsiz chiqdi (hech kimga yoqmadi).

options: mutlaqo muvaffaqiyatsiz chiqish, hech kimga yoqmaslik

definition: To be damaged in large numbers; when a lot of people suddenly become ill.

sentence.en: Trees and road signs were going down like ninepins in a storm.
sentence.uz: Bo'ron paytida daraxtlar va yo'l belgilari ketma-ket (ommaviy ravishda) qulab tushayotgan edi.

options: ketma-ket qulash, ko'p miqdorda zarar ko'rish/kasal bo'lish

definition: To treat someone more gently, less harshly.

sentence.en: Go easy on your son, he's just a kid.
sentence.uz: O'g'lingizga yumshoqroq munosabatda bo'ling (unchalik qattiq tergamang), u hali shunchaki bola.

definition: To not follow the script; disturb the order of things.

sentence.en: Stop arguing! Let's stick to the plan. I don't like it when you two go off-book like this.
sentence.uz: Baqirishni to'xtatinglar! Rejaga amal qilaylik. Ikkalangizning bunday rejadan (ssenariydan) tashqari ish qilishingiz menga yoqmayapti.

definition: Start behaving in an uncontrollable or intolerable way.

sentence.en: My daughter started going off the rails shortly after graduation.
sentence.uz: Qizim o'qishni tugatgandan so'ng ko'p o'tmay yo'ldan chiqib ketdi (yomon xulq-atvor ko'rsata boshladi).

options: nazoratdan chiqish, yo'ldan chiqib ketish (yomon xulq ko'rsatish)

definition: To make an extra effort; do more than is expected of you.

sentence.en: We need to go the extra mile to release the game on time.
sentence.uz: O'yinni o'z vaqtida chiqarish uchun biz qo'shimcha harakat qilishimiz (kutilganidan ko'prog'ini bajarishimiz) kerak.

options: qo'shimcha harakat qilish, kutilgandan ko'prog'ini bajarish

definition: To fall to an ultra-low level.

sentence.en: Due to the crisis, resort prices have gone through the floor.
sentence.uz: Inqiroz tufayli kurortlar (dam olish maskanlari) narxi keskin tushib ketdi (er bilan bitta bo'ldi).

options: keskin pasayib ketish, eng past darajaga tushish

definition: Being very careful about what you say.

sentence.en: Guard your tongue, woman, you're talking about my mother!
sentence.uz: Tilingga ehtiyot bo'l, ayol, sen mening onam haqimda gapiryapsan!

definition: Not yet decided; unsure of the future; not certain what will happen to it.

sentence.en: After that scandal, the future of my company still hangs in the balance.
sentence.uz: Ushbu mojarodan keyin kompaniyamning kelajagi hali ham qil ustida turibdi (noma'lum bo'lib qolmoqda).

options: qil ustida turish, kelajagi noma'lum/hal bo'lmagan bo'lish

word: Have a bone to pick with someone
definition: To talk to the person about the things that annoy you; to have an issue to discuss or argue about.

sentence.en: Darling, I've got a bone to pick with you. Why did you have dinner with your ex?
sentence.uz: Azizim, sen bilan gaplashib oladigan gapim (g'alvam) bor. Nega yana sobiq yigiting bilan kechki ovqat tanovul qilding?

options: kimdir bilan gaplashib oladigan muammoli gap/g'alvasi bo'lish

word: Have a bee in your bonnet
definition: To talk a lot about something or be extremely passionate about it (mostly in a very annoying way).

sentence.en: He's got a bee in his bonnet about video games.
sentence.uz: U video o'yinlar haqida gapiraverib, hamma vaqtini o'shanga bag'ishlaydi (miyasini yeb yuborgan).

options: biror narsaga o'ta berilib ketib, faqat shu haqda gapiraverish

word: Have another string to one's bow
definition: To emphasize that you have another plan/idea/skill to use if it's needed.

sentence.en: You're right, my plan didn't work, but I have another string to my bow.
sentence.uz: To'g'ri aytasiz, mening rejam ish bermadi, lekin menda zaxira reja (boshqa imkoniyat) bor.

options: zaxira reja, chora yoki qo'shimcha ko'nikmaga ega bo'lish

definition: To get angry/mad very easily.

sentence.en: Her boss is known to have a short fuse.
sentence.uz: Uning boshlig'i tez jahli chiqadigan (gugurtdek tez yonadigan) odam sifatida tanilgan.

options: tez jahli chiqadigan, tez qizishadigan bo'lish

definition: Have more important things to do.

sentence.en: Sorry, I can't help you with your project, I've got bigger fish to fry!
sentence.uz: Kechirasiz, loyihangizda yordam berolmayman, mening muhimroq ishlarim bor!

definition: To have hidden flaws or weaknesses.

sentence.en: Most of the greatest minds in history had feet of clay.
sentence.uz: Tarixdagi eng buyuk mutafakkirlarning ham yashirin kamchiliklari yoki zaif tomonlari bo'lgan.

options: yashirin kamchiliklari yoki zaif tomonlari bo'lish

definition: To have a certain quality/skill.

sentence.en: You don't have it in you to make the difficult choices.
sentence.uz: Senda qiyin qarorlar qabul qila oladigan fazilat (ichki kuch) yo'q.

options: kerakli fazilat yoki qobiliyatga ega bo'lish

definition: To be angry or inflamed; to be in an aggressive or violent mood.

sentence.en: Her offensive jokes really got my blood up.
sentence.uz: Uning haqoratomuz hazillari qonimni qaynatib yubordi (g'azablantirdi).

options: qoni qaynamoq, qattiq g'azablanib tajovuzkor holatga kelish

definition: To have enough determination to do something difficult, risky, or unpleasant.

sentence.en: I don't have the stomach for a real fight.
sentence.uz: Menda haqiqiy jang uchun yetarli jur'at (yurak) yo'q.

options: biror qiyin/xavfli ishga jur'ati, yuragi betlash

word: Have your back to the wall
definition: Find yourself in an extremely difficult situation with limited options for action.

sentence.en: He really has his back to the wall because of all his debts and loans.
sentence.uz: Barcha qarzlari va kreditlari tufayli u chindan ham chorasiz (orqasi devorga taqalgan) ahvolda qoldi.

word: Have your fair share of something
definition: A lot or more than enough of something.

sentence.en: He's had his fair share of failures in his life.
sentence.uz: U hayotida yetarlicha (ancha-muncha) omadsizliklarni boshdan kechirgan.

options: biror narsadan yetarlicha (ortig'i bilan) boshdan kechirish/ega bo'lish

definition: To have a great influence on someone's opinion or behaviour; to control someone/something.

sentence.en: Traditional values still hold sway in our home.
sentence.uz: Bizning uyimizda an'anaviy qadriyatlar hali ham katta ta'sirga ega (hukmronlik qiladi).

options: katta ta'sirga ega bo'lish, hukmronlik/nazorat qilish

definition: Close to catching someone; close to finding something.

sentence.en: A detective is hot on the trail of the murderer.
sentence.uz: Detektiv qotilning ketidan tushgan (uni tutishga juda yaqin turibdi).

options: issiq izidan borish, tutishga juda yaqin bo'lish

definition: Extremely angry or embarrassed.

sentence.en: I got really hot under the collar when my ex showed up at the party.
sentence.uz: Ziyofatda sobiq sevgilim paydo bo'lganida juda qattiq g'azablandim (yoki noqulay ahvolda qoldim).

options: qattiq g'azablanish yoki qattiq xijolat bo'lish

definition: If all other attempts have failed; if what was planned cannot happen.

sentence.en: If all else fails, I can get into the fashion business.
sentence.uz: Agar boshqa barcha rejalarim ish bermasa (chippakka chiqsa), moda biznesiga kirishishim mumkin.

options: agar boshqa barcha choralar/rejalar ish bermasa

definition: To be in a difficult, tough, or threatening situation.

sentence.en: I'm in a bind to pay my bills this month.
sentence.uz: Bu oy to'lovlarni to'lashda qiyin (tang) ahvolda qoldim.

options: qiyin, tang yoki xavfli vaziyatda bo'lish

definition: Worried; confused; upset.

sentence.en: Jennifer is all in a stew over her lost mobile phone.
sentence.uz: Jennifer yo'qolgan telefoni tufayli juda xavotirda va es-hushini yo'qotgan ahvolda.

definition: In an unemotional way; in a cruel and calm way.

sentence.en: She shot him in cold blood.
sentence.uz: U uni shafqatsizlarcha va sovuqqonlik bilan (hech qanday his-tuyg'usiz) otib tashladi.

definition: Not stable; not smooth; often stops and then starts again.

sentence.en: The music player works in fits and starts.
sentence.uz: Musika pleyeri barqaror ishlamayapti (tez-tez to'xtab, keyin yana ishlab ketyapti).

definition: At the peak of activity.

sentence.en: When we arrived, the party was in full swing.
sentence.uz: Biz yetib kelganimizda, ziyofat ayni qizigan (avjiga chiqqan) pallada edi.

definition: Unscathed; without being damaged.

sentence.en: An icicle fell on me, but thankfully I am still in one piece.
sentence.uz: Ustimga muz bo'lagi tushib ketdi, lekin xayriyatki, sog'-salomatman (shikastlanmadim).

definition: In someone's disfavour.

sentence.en: I'm in her bad books because I forgot her birthday.
sentence.uz: Tug'ilgan kunini unutib qo'yganim uchun uning nazaridan qoldim (g'azabiga duchor bo'ldim).

options: kimningdir nazaridan qolish, yoqimsiz bo'lib qolish

definition: Forthcoming; about to happen to someone; planned for someone.

sentence.en: I have a big surprise in store for you.
sentence.uz: Siz uchun tayyorlab qo'yilgan (tez orada sodir bo'ladigan) katta syurprizim bor.

definition: Eventually; after a long time.

sentence.en: All her secrets will be revealed in the fullness of time.
sentence.uz: Vaqti-soati kelib (uzoq vaqtdan keyin), uning barcha sirlari fosh bo'ladi.

definition: In clear and simple language without complicated words and expressions.

sentence.en: Please explain this theorem to me in words of one syllable.
sentence.uz: Iltimos, bu teoremani menga oddiy va tushunarli tilda (murakkab so'zlarsiz) tushuntirib bering.

options: oddiy va tushunarli tilda, londa qilib

definition: Being extremely impatient because you want to do/get something as soon as possible.

sentence.en: He's itching to get back to work.
sentence.uz: U ishga qaytishga oshiqmoqda (tinchlik bilmay sabrsizlanyapti).

definition: To emphasize that it's time to do what should have been done a long time ago.

sentence.en: It's high time you got a job.
sentence.uz: Ishga kirishingning ayni vaqti keldi (allaqachon ishga kirishing kerak edi).

options: allaqachon bajarilishi kerak bo'lgan ayni vaqti kelish

word: It's no skin off my nose
definition: To emphasize that you don't care if someone does something, because it's not your responsibility.

sentence.en: It's no skin off my nose if they stop working with us, I am just a trainee.
sentence.uz: Agar ular biz bilan ishlashni to'xtatishsa, menga farqi yo'q (menga issiq-sovug'i yo'q), men shunchaki amaliyotchiman.

definition: To refresh someone's memory; to help someone remember something.

sentence.en: That family photo jogged my memory.
sentence.uz: Ushbu oilaviy surat xotiramni yangiladi (eslashimga yordam berdi).

definition: A starting point for an activity, journey, or project.

sentence.en: Amsterdam is the best jumping-off point for a trip to the Netherlands.
sentence.uz: Amsterdam Niderlandiyaga sayohat qilish uchun eng yaxshi boshlang'ich nuqtadir.

definition: Being intensely frightened by things that shouldn't normally frighten you.

sentence.en: Ever since she returned, she's been jumping on shadows.
sentence.uz: Qaytib kelganidan beri u vahimakash bo'lib qolgan (arzimas narsalardan, o'z soyasidan ham qo'rqadi).

options: arzimas narsalardan vahimaga tushish, o'z soyasidan qo'rqish

definition: To avoid attracting attention.

sentence.en: I hope you will try to keep a low profile tonight; the police are looking for you.
sentence.uz: Umid qilamanki, bugun kechasi e'tiborni tortmaslikka (tinchroq yurishga) harakat qilasan, chunki polisiya seni qidirmoqda.

options: e'tiborni tortmaslikka harakat qilish, yashirinroq yurish

definition: To stay cheerful during difficult or challenging times.

sentence.en: I'll try my best to keep my chin up, thanks dad.
sentence.uz: Ruhimni tushirmaslikka (tetik turishga) harakat qilaman, rahmat dada.

options: og'ir damlarda tushkunlikka tushmaslik, tetik turish

word: Keep one's nose to the grindstone
definition: To do intensive, heavy, or continuous work.

sentence.en: Dina's got to keep her nose to the grindstone to feed her family.
sentence.uz: Oilasini boqish uchun Dina tinimsiz va qattiq mehnat qilishi kerak.

definition: To remain calm and be fully prepared for a particular situation/event.

sentence.en: Conflict may not arise, but there is no harm in keeping your powder dry.
sentence.uz: Mojaro kelib chiqmasligi mumkin, lekin shay turishning (har qanday vaziyatga tayyor turishning) zarari yo'q.

definition: To watch very carefully.

sentence.en: Just drive slowly and keep your eyes peeled.
sentence.uz: Shunchaki sekin haydang va ko'zingizni shartta ochib (hushyor bo'lib) boring.

options: juda ehtiyotkor va hushyor bo'lib kuzatish

definition: To urge someone not to panic and stay calm.

sentence.en: Keep your hair on, we're almost there!
sentence.uz: Xavotirlanma, o'zingni bos, deyarli yetib keldik!

definition: To watch someone/something carefully; always know where someone/something is.

sentence.en: How should I know where Jimmy is? I don't keep tabs on him.
sentence.uz: Jimmi qayerdaligini men qayerdan bilay? Uni nazorat qilib (kuzatib) yurganim yo'q-ku.

definition: Either success or total failure.

sentence.en: This project will be kill or cure for our company.
sentence.uz: Bu loyiha kompaniyamiz uchun yo hayot-mamot (yo to'liq g'alaba yoki butunlay inqiroz) bo'ladi.

options: yo g'alaba yoki mutlaqo mag'lubiyat (yo hayot yo mamot)

definition: To memorize something completely.

sentence.en: I'm pretty sure I know this song by heart.
sentence.uz: Bu qo'shiqni yoddan (yurakdan) bilishimga mutlaqo aminman.

definition: Keep talking or pitching your idea/plan in a boring or annoying manner.

sentence.en: I don't want to labour the point, but my project is much better.
sentence.uz: Bir gapni chaynayverishni (asabga tegishni) xohlamayman-u, lekin mening loyiham ancha yaxshi.

options: bir gapni qayta-qayta gapirib jonga tegish

definition: To treat someone unfairly or badly over a period of time; to cause a lot of problems.

sentence.en: She led me a merry dance before I finally got her to sign the papers.
sentence.uz: Hujjatlarni imzolashga ko'ndirgunimcha u meni rosa sarson qildi (boshimga ko'p muammo soldi).

options: birovni uzoq vaqt sarson qilish, boshiga muammo solish

word: Lead someone down the garden path
definition: To mislead; cheat; deceive.

sentence.en: Vince may have led me down the garden path with that investment opportunity.
sentence.uz: Vins o'sha investisiya imkoniyati bilan meni chalg'itgan (aldagan) bo'lishi mumkin.

definition: An action performed without the certainty of what will happen as a result.

sentence.en: My move to Europe was a leap in the dark.
sentence.uz: Yevropaga ko'chib o'tishim tavakkalchilik (natijasi noma'lum bo'lgan qadam) edi.

options: tavakkalchilik, natijasi noma'lum bo'lgan ishga qo'l urish

definition: To leave/abandon someone at a time when they really need your assistance or support.

sentence.en: My colleagues left me in the lurch and I had to finish the report myself.
sentence.uz: Hamkasblarim meni qiyin ahvolda (yordam kerak paytda) tashlab ketishdi va hisobotni o'zim yakunlashimga to'g'ri keldi.

options: og'ir ahvolda, yordamga muhtoj paytda tashlab ketish

definition: To do everything you can to find something.

sentence.en: Ginny left no stone unturned in her search for her real parents.
sentence.uz: Jinni haqiqiy ota-onasini topish uchun hamma chorani ko'rdi (qidirilmagan joy qoldirmadi).

options: hamma chorani ko'rish, qidirilmagan joy qoldirmaslik

definition: To listen to someone in a friendly and sympathetic manner.

sentence.en: My friends are always ready to lend an ear to me.
sentence.uz: Do'stlarim har doim meni chin dildan tinglashga (dardimga quloq solishga) tayyor.

options: dardiga quloq solish, chin dildan tinglash

definition: To remain hidden; to try not to be seen or noticed.

sentence.en: After the last fraud, the scammers decided to lie low for a while.
sentence.uz: Oxirgi firibgarlikdan keyin, firibgarlar bir muddat pismayib (yashirinib) turishga qaror qilishdi.

options: pismayib turish, ko'zga ko'rinmaslikka harakat qilish

definition: To put someone at a disadvantage.

sentence.en: Lack of experience loaded the dice against Sarah as a candidate.
sentence.uz: Tajribasizlik Sara uchun nomzod sifatida imkoniyatlarini pasaytirdi (uni noqulay ahvolga qo'ydi).

definition: With very little chance of success.

sentence.en: It's a long shot, but I still want to try to get the job.
sentence.uz: Imkoniyat juda kam (ehtimoli past), lekin barbir bu ishga kirishga urinib ko'rmoqchiman.

options: ehtimoli juda past bo'lgan kichik imkoniyat

definition: To make someone speak more openly or freely.

sentence.en: The beer had loosened John's tongue.
sentence.uz: Pivo Jonning tilini kalitini ochgan edi (ochiqroq gapirishga majbur qildi).

options: tilini burro qilish, ochiq gapirishga majbur qilish

definition: To lose one's nerve or courage in a stressful situation.

sentence.en: I wanted to fight him back, but I lost my bottle at the last minute.
sentence.uz: Unga qarshi kurashmoqchi edim, lekin oxirgi soniyada yuragim orqaga tortib ketdi (g'ayratim/shijoatim so'ndi).

definition: The ability to do something extremely well.

sentence.en: He has a magic touch in the kitchen.
sentence.uz: Uning qo'li gul (oshxonada har qanday taomni ajoyib pishiradi).

options: qo'li gul bo'lish, biror ishni o'ta mahorat bilan bajarish

definition: To treat something in a way that makes it seem more significant, valuable, or important than it actually is.

sentence.en: Students always make such a meal of the simplest test.
sentence.uz: Talabalar har doim eng oddiy testni ham haddan tashqari bo'rttirib (katta muammo qilib) yuborishadi.

options: arzimas narsani haddan tashqari bo'rttirish/muammo qilish

word: Make a rod for your own back
definition: To do something that will cause you trouble/problems in the future.

sentence.en: Our management made a rod for their own back when they fired skilled workers.
sentence.uz: Rahbariyatimiz malakali xodimlarni bo'shatib, o'z boshiga o'zi balo orttirdi (kelajakda muammo yaratdi).

options: o'z boshiga o'zi balo orttirish (kelajakda muammo tug'diradigan ish qilish)

definition: To try as hard as you can to achieve something; to stop at nothing.

sentence.en: I had to move heaven and earth to get my dream job.
sentence.uz: Orzuyimdagi ishga kirish uchun yerni ham, ko'kni ham larzaga keltirdim (bor imkoniyatimni ishga soldim).

options: yer-u ko'kni larzaga keltirish, bor kuchini ishga solish

definition: To stop something at an early stage before it becomes a big problem.

sentence.en: It is extremely important to nip this problem in the bud.
sentence.uz: Bu muammoni kurtak yozmasidanoq (ildizi bilan boshlang'ich bosqichda) bartaraf etish o'ta muhim.

word: Nod is as good as a wink
definition: To emphasize that there is no need to explain something further, because the person already understands or knows enough about it.

sentence.en: Come on, a nod is as good as a wink. It's all because of him.
sentence.uz: Bo'ldi-da endi, tushunganga ishora ham kifoya (ortiqcha tushuntirish shart emas).

options: tushunganga ishora kifoya (ortiqcha tushuntirish shart emasligi)

definition: Without any restrictions or limits.

sentence.en: In my house you can do whatever you want, no holds barred.
sentence.uz: Mening uyimda nima xohlasang qilishing mumkin, hech qanday cheklovlar yo'q.

definition: Quite difficult or unpleasant.

sentence.en: College life is no picnic; it requires hard work.
sentence.uz: Kollej hayoti senga bayram (yengil-yelpi sayr) emas, u qattiq mehnat talab qiladi.

options: oson yoki yoqimli ish emas (ancha qiyin)

definition: To emphasize that it is very easy to guess something; something that is very obvious.

sentence.en: No prizes for guessing where John is; he is always at the bar.
sentence.uz: Jonning qayerdaligini topish qiyin emas (bu hammaga ayon), u doim barda.

options: topish/taxmin qilish qiyin emas, hammaga ayon

definition: Having some unpleasant aspects.

sentence.en: My job is not a bed of roses.
sentence.uz: Mening ishim senga atirgullar to'shalgan joy emas (o'ziga yarasha qiyinchiliklari bor).

options: hayot hamma vaqt ham oson/yoqimli bo'lavermasligi

word: Not a hair out of place
definition: To have a very neat/tidy appearance.

sentence.en: He was so gorgeous in his new suit, not a hair out of place.
sentence.uz: Yangi kostyumida shunchalik kelishgan ediki, ust-boshi top-toza va saranjom (sochining bir tolamasi ham asliga bejo emas) edi.

definition: To refuse to change your mind/position.

sentence.en: I tried to negotiate a better offer but they wouldn't budge an inch.
sentence.uz: Men yaxshiroq taklif bo'yicha kelishmoqchi bo'ldim, lekin ular bir qadam ham ortga chekinishmadi (o'z so'zida qat'iy turishdi).

word: Not have a care in the world
definition: Without worrying about anything.

sentence.en: I miss the old school days, when I didn't have a care in the world.
sentence.uz: Eski maktab davrlarini sog'inaman, o'shanda dunyoda hech qanday tashvishim yo'q edi.

options: hech qanday g'am-tashvishi bo'lmaslik, beparvo yashash

word: Not have a leg to stand on
definition: To have no proof of your rightness/correctness.

sentence.en: I don't have a leg to stand on. It's only my word against hers.
sentence.uz: Menda o'zimni oqlash uchun hech qanday dalil (asoslash) yo'q. Bu shunchaki mening gapim uning gapiga qarshi xolos.

options: o'z fikrini isbotlash uchun hech qanday dalil/asosga ega bo'lmaslik

definition: Mentally ill; cannot think clearly.

sentence.en: Leave her alone, she's not in her right mind at the moment.
sentence.uz: Uni tinch qo'ying, u hozir o'ziga kelganicha yo'q (es-hushi joyida emas).

options: es-hushi joyida bo'lmaslik, sog'lom o'ylay olmaslik

definition: Annoyed; irritated; angry; unhappy.

sentence.en: I wasn't best pleased when my mother married again.
sentence.uz: Onam qaytadan turmushga chiqqanida men bundan unchalik xursand bo'lmadim (jahlim chiqdi).

definition: Definitely; for sure; without a doubt.

sentence.en: If you leave me here alone, I'll break up with you! No two ways about it!
sentence.uz: Agar meni bu yerda yolg'iz qoldirib ketsang, sendan ajralaman! Buning boshqa yo'li (shubhasi) yo'q!

options: buning boshqa yo'li yo'q, bu aniq/shubhasiz

definition: Removed from one's responsibility; no longer needing to be looked after.

sentence.en: If you are unable to complete these tasks, I'll be glad to take them off your hands.
sentence.uz: Agar bu vazifalarni bajara olmasangiz, ularni zimmangizdan soqit qilishdan (o'z zimmamga olishdan) xursand bo'laman.

definition: Not correct; inaccurate; wrong.

sentence.en: The facts she provided are way off the mark.
sentence.uz: U taqdim etgan faktlar mutlaqo noto'g'ri (haqiqatdan yiroq).

definition: Absolutely necessary in a particular situation.

sentence.en: We must hurry, time is of the essence!
sentence.uz: Shoshilishimiz kerak, vaqt o'ta muhim (g'animat)!

options: o'ta muhim, hal qiluvchi ahamiyatga ega

definition: Without the slightest chance of success; sure to fail.

sentence.en: He's on a hiding to nothing in this competition.
sentence.uz: Bu musobaqada uning g'alaba qozonishga zarracha ham imkoni yo'q (muvaffaqiyatsizlikka mahkum).

options: muvaffaqiyatga zarracha imkoni bo'lmaslik, mag'lubiyatga mahkumlik

definition: Very surprising or unexpected.

sentence.en: His last-minute goal was one for the books.
sentence.uz: Uning so'nggi soniyalarda urgan goli mutlaqo kutilmagan (hayratlanarli) holat bo'ldi.

definition: Amicable or friendly enough to talk (often used in negative form).

sentence.en: I'm not on speaking terms with my family at the moment.
sentence.uz: Hozirda oilam bilan gaplashmayapman (aloqalarimiz sovuqlashgan).

options: gaplashib turadigan darajada munosabati yaxshi bo'lish

definition: A dangerous animal/criminal who walks free (mostly because they have escaped from prison/cage).

sentence.en: The dangerous criminal is still on the loose.
sentence.uz: Xavfli jinoyatchi hali ham ozodlikda (hali tutilmagan).

options: ozodlikda yurish (qochib ketgan xavfli shaxs/hayvon haqida)

definition: Very close to experiencing something; the moment when something is about to happen.

sentence.en: We are on the verge of a big discovery.
sentence.uz: Biz katta kashfiyot arafasida (juda yaqinida) turibmiz.

options: arafasida, sodir bo'lishiga juda yaqin qolish

word: On your own head be it
definition: To warn someone that they will have to take full responsibility for what they are about to do.

sentence.en: If you choose to disobey my order, then on your own heads be it!
sentence.uz: Agar mening buyrug'imga bo'ysunmaslikni tanlasangiz, javobgarlik o'zingizning bo'yningizda (o'zingizdan ko'ring)!

definition: Slightly ill/unwell/unhappy.

sentence.en: He's feeling a bit out of sorts today.
sentence.uz: U bugun o'zini biroz nosog'lom (tobasiz/kayfiyatsiz) his qilyapti.

options: o'zini nosog'lom, tobasiz yoki kayfiyatsiz his qilish

word: Out of the corner of one's eye
definition: Looking at something indirectly; when you see something briefly, rather than clearly.

sentence.en: Out of the corner of my eye, I saw my wife talking to a stranger.
sentence.uz: Ko'zimning qiri bilan xotinimning begona odam bilan gaplashayotganini ko'rib qoldim.

options: ko'zini qiri bilan qarash, bilinar-bilinmas ko'rish

definition: No longer young and fit; too old to perform as well as before.

sentence.en: Ron is over the hill as a professional basketball player.
sentence.uz: Professional basketbolchi sifatida Ronning yoshi o'tib qoldi (endi avvalgidek yosh va baquvvat emas).

options: yoshi o'tib qolish, keksalik tufayli avvalgi qobiliyatini yo'qotish

definition: To appear less important, significant, or impressive when compared with something else.

sentence.en: All my problems pale into insignificance when compared to the problems of the homeless.
sentence.uz: Uysizlar muammosi bilan solishtirganda mening barcha muammolarim ip esholmay qoladi (mutlaqo ahamiyatsiz bo'lib ko'rinadi).

options: boshqa narsa oldida o'z qiymatini/ahamiyatini mutlaqo yo'qotish

definition: One who has perfect moral values.

sentence.en: Ron was considered to be a paragon of virtue.
sentence.uz: Ron yuksak xulq-atvor (fazilat) namunasi deb hisoblanar edi.

definition: To shift the responsibility to someone else.

sentence.en: It's your fault because you're in charge, so don't try to pass the buck.
sentence.uz: Siz mas'ul bo'lganingiz uchun bu sizning aybingiz, shuning uchun javobgarlikni birovga ag'darishga urinmang.

definition: To emphasize that the proposed idea/concept/plan is ridiculous and unlikely to be implemented.

sentence.en: I will never marry her - perish the thought!
sentence.uz: Men unga hech qachon uylanmayman - Xudo ko'rsatmasin (xayolingga ham keltirma)!

options: Xudo ko'rsatmasin, xayolga ham keltirmaslik kerak bo'lgan narsa

definition: Something that is not destined to come true.

sentence.en: His plans to become president of several countries are simply pipe dreams.
sentence.uz: Uning bir vaqtning o'zida bir nechta davlatga prezident bo'lish rejalari shunchaki xomxayol (amalga oshmaydigan orzu).

definition: Without problems; smooth; easy.

sentence.en: Her surgery was plain sailing; everything went well.
sentence.uz: Uning jarrohlik amaliyoti juda oson va muammosiz (silliq) o'tdi.

definition: To do something that will be to your disadvantage and to your opponent's advantage; to act in the way your opponent wants you to act.

sentence.en: It would be playing into Rita's hands to react to her humiliating jokes.
sentence.uz: Ritaning haqoratomuz hazillariga javob qaytarish uning tegirmoniga suv quyish (uning foydasiga ishlash) bo'ladi.

options: birovning tegirmoniga suv quyish, raqibining foydasiga ishlab qo'yish

definition: To behave in a way that is beneficial in a given situation; to do something in a well-planned way.

sentence.en: If you play your cards right, you can win this competition.
sentence.uz: Agar aqlli ish tutsangiz (reja bo'yicha to'g'ri harakat qilsangiz), bu musobaqada g'olib chiqishingiz mumkin.

options: aqlli ish tutish, vaziyatdan to'g'ri foydalanish

definition: To make every possible effort; do the best you can.

sentence.en: The police pulled out all the stops to find the robber.
sentence.uz: Polisiya o'g'rini topish uchun bor imkoniyatini ishga soldi (qo'lidan kelgan barcha choralarni ko'rdi).

options: bor imkoniyatini ishga solish, qo'lidan kelgancha harakat qilish

definition: To tell someone a lie, as a joke.

sentence.en: Calm down Ian, it's not true, I was only pulling your leg.
sentence.uz: Tinchlaning Ian, bu haqiqat emas, men shunchaki sizni laqillatgandim (hazillashgandim).
